subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-06-17
subcodes.first_line: In the days of the Blessed Beauty, I never had a desire to write. The friends even complained about it.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ایام جمال مبارک من ابداً مایل به تحریر نبودم بدرجه ئی که از اطراف احباء گله می کردند
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
